1. Feature Overview


What this is


A single-page scrolling website that serves as technical documentation for JackHamr — the AI agent orchestration platform that ships software end-to-end. The site is written for developers and users who want to understand how JackHamr works: the pipeline lifecycle, the agent system, orchestration model, skills, memory wiki, approval gates, Docker environments, board/task system, Slack integration, GitHub integration, and customization options.


This is not marketing copy. It is reference documentation presented in a visually polished, dark-themed, card-based layout that matches jackhamr.ai's design language. The content is sourced from first-hand knowledge — the agent writing this spec runs inside JackHamr.


End-to-end user journey


1. User navigates to the site URL in a browser.

2. The page loads with a sticky blurred navigation bar (sections: Overview, Pipeline, Agents, Orchestration, Skills, Memory, Gates, Environments, Board, Integrations, Customization).

3. A hero section introduces JackHamr with a one-line definition and a visual pipeline progress indicator (Spec → Plan → Build → Test → Review → Ship).

4. User scrolls down through documentation sections, each presented as a card with an icon, heading, bullet list, and a visual element (diagram, code snippet, or mock UI).

5. Scroll-reveal animations progressively disclose content as it enters the viewport.

6. Pipeline progress indicators animate on scroll, showing the lifecycle phases lighting up sequentially.

7. Card hover effects provide subtle interactivity (border glow, slight lift, accent color shift).

8. On mobile, the layout collapses to a single column; the nav becomes a hamburger or simplified bar.

9. User reaches the footer with a summary and links.


Key design decisions


DecisionRationale
Single-page scroll, no multi-page navUser explicitly chose scroll-based; simpler deployment, no routing, instant access to all content
Vanilla HTML + Tailwind CSS + minimal vanilla JSNo framework overhead; deployable as static files anywhere; user confirmed
Dark theme only (no light mode toggle)Matches jackhamr.ai's dark mode; reduces complexity; user confirmed dark-only
Tailwind via CDN (Play CDN)No build step needed; single-file deployment; acceptable for a documentation site
Content sourced from first-hand system knowledgeThe agent runs inside JackHamr; ensures accuracy over marketing claims
No backend, no searchStatic site; scroll-based navigation eliminates need for search
IntersectionObserver for scroll revealsLightweight, no library dependency, native browser API
SVG icons inline (no icon library)Keeps the site dependency-free; full control over styling
JetBrains Mono for code blocks and technical labelsMatches jackhamr.ai's typographic system

2. Architecture Diagram



┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                     User's Browser                           │
│                                                             │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐   │
│  │              index.html (single file)                │   │
│  │                                                      │   │
│  │  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────────────────────────────┐ │   │
│  │  │ Nav Bar  │  │  Tailwind CSS (Play CDN)          │ │   │
│  │  │ (sticky) │  │  + Custom CSS (inline <style>)    │ │   │
│  │  └──────────┘  └──────────────────────────────────┘ │   │
│  │                                                      │   │
│  │  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │   │
│  │  │           Page Sections (DOM)                   │  │   │
│  │  │                                                  │  │   │
│  │  │  Hero → Pipeline → Agents → Orchestration →     │  │   │
│  │  │  Skills → Memory → Gates → Environments →       │  │   │
│  │  │  Board → Integrations → Customization → Footer  │  │   │
│  │  └────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │   │
│  │                                                      │   │
│  │  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────┐  │   │
│  │  │  vanilla JS (inline <script>)                  │  │   │
│  │  │  - IntersectionObserver (scroll reveals)       │  │   │
│  │  │  - Nav active-section highlighting             │  │   │
│  │  │  - Pipeline progress animation                 │  │   │
│  │  │  - Smooth scroll on nav clicks                 │  │   │
│  │  └────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                                                             │
│  External resources (CDN):                                  │
│  - Tailwind Play CDN (cdn.tailwindcss.com)                  │
│  - Google Fonts: Inter + JetBrains Mono                     │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

No server. No database. No API calls. Purely static.
